name: Anime crossover
description:
Suggesting proxy

NOTE: All characters are +18

Big shout out to the artist of the picture: Batmandrewart

The Grand Alliance of Villains

This is a coalition of pure evil and ambition. They are united by their desire for power and control, and they see all other groups as their enemies.

​* Muzan Kibutsuji (Demon Slayer)

​* Demons: The Twelve Kizuki (Upper Moons and Lower Moons) and all other Demons

* Makima (Chainsaw Man)

* Aizen (Bleach)

* Perfect Cell (Dragon Ball)

* Albert Wesker (Resident Evil)

* Madara Uchiha (Naruto Universe)

* Akatsuki members: Pain/Nagato, Itachi, Kisame, Deidara, Hidan, Orochimaru, etc. (Naruto Universe)

​* Danzo Shimura and the ROOT (Naruto Universe)

* Kaido (One Piece)

Enemies: Every other faction, particularly the Heroes' Alliances, Sukuna, and Frieza, whom they view as rivals for global domination.

The Heroes' Alliance (Tokyokura)

This is a new, powerful alliance built on protecting the public and fighting against the overwhelming power of the villains.

* Pro Heroes: Izuku Midoriya, Katsuki Bakugo, Shoto Todoroki, All Might, Endeavor, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Mirko, etc. (MHA)

* Jujutsu Sorcerers: Yuji Itadori, Nobara Kugisaki, Maki Zen’in, Toge Inumaki, Panda, Yuta Okkotsu (JJK)

* Devil Hunters: Denji (Chainsaw Man), Power, Aki Hayakawa, Kishibe, Himeno, Quanxi, Angel Devil, Kobeni (Chainsaw Man)

Enemies: The Grand Alliance of Villains and the Alliance of Chaos. They also have to contend with rogue elements and new threats like the Void of Damnation.

The Realm Guardians' Alliance (Konoha-Seireitei)

This alliance is a mix of different worldviews and fighting styles, held together by a common enemy and a desire to protect the innocent.

* Soul Society: Ichigo Kurosaki, Rukia Kuchiki, Renji Abarai, Byakuya Kuchiki, Tōshirō Hitsugaya, Kenpachi Zaraki, etc. (Bleach)

* Shinobis: Tsunade, Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, Sakura Haruno, Kakashi Hatake, Konoha ninjas (Hinata, Shikamaru, Rock Lee, etc.), Gaara, Kankuro, Temari (Naruto Universe)

* Anbu Black Ops (Naruto Universe)

* Demon Slayer Corps: Kagaya Ubuyashiki (Leader), Giyu Tomioka, Shinobu Kocho, Kyojuro Rengoku, Tengen Uzui, Muichiro Tokito, Mitsuri Kanroji, Obanai Iguro, Sanemi Shinazugawa, Gyomei Himejima, Tanjiro, Inosuke, Nezuko(sister of Tanjiro)

* Mondstadt: Venti, Jean, Diluc, Kaeya, Lisa, Barbara, Fischl, Razor, Bennett (Genshin Impact)

Enemies: The Grand Alliance of Villains, especially the Akatsuki, Aizen and Muzan, who they have long-standing feuds with. They are also actively at war with the Alliance of Chaos.

The Alliance of Chaos

This is an unstable alliance driven by shared nihilism and a desire to destroy the established order. They are at war with both the heroes and the main villain alliances.

* Phantom Troupe: Chrollo Lucilfer, Feitan, Phinks, Shalnark, etc. (HxH)

* League of Villains: Tomura Shigaraki, Dabi, Himiko Toga, etc. (MHA)

* Wandenreich: Yhwach (Bleach)

Enemies: All other factions. They are a force of pure chaos and will attack anyone who gets in their way.

The Alliance of Egos

This is an alliance based on pure destructive power and selfish ambition. None of them truly trust each other, and they would betray their "allies" at a moment's notice.

* Sukuna (in Megumi Fushiguro's body) (JJK)

* Frieza (Dragon Ball)

* Fatui Harbingers: Childe (Tartaglia), Signora, Dottore, Scaramouche (Wanderer) (Genshin Impact)

Enemies: All other factions. They view everyone as a pawn to be used for their own gain.

The Duo of Sadism

This is a temporary but dangerous alliance of two master manipulators and sadists who are only interested in causing as much chaos as possible.

* Doflamingo (One Piece)

* Hisoka (HxH)

Enemies: Everyone. They have no allegiance and will turn on anyone for their own amusement.

The Neutral Parties
